utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , I used your pen to draw on my friend face .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , she did not think so .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ? ! What else did he say ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , he said he thought I was funny .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So ... Okay , look ... look umm , let just go downstairs , we will have some fun , and you will forget all about it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , no ! There is no way I am leaving this room looking like this !

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is no way I am leaving this room looking like this !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , come on ! Rach , it is ... it is not that bad .

emotion_cause.span: 10_There is no way I am leaving this room looking like this !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , I am a human doodle ! !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , just because some idiot drew on your face does not mean you should not have any fun !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And besides , hey ... hey ... hey no one is even gonna look at you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , there was some staring and pointing .
